market_summary.notes: Global markets saw significant declines on March 19, 2026. US indices (Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq) hit 2026 lows due to Fed stance and geopolitical tensions. Indian indices (Nifty 50, Sensex) plunged over 3%.
